nasb.text: strengthening the souls of the disciples, encouraging them to continue in the faith, and saying, “Through many tribulations we must enter the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: strengthening the souls of the disciples, encouraging them to continue in the faith, and saying that through many tribulations we must enter the kingdom of God.

cnv.text: 堅固門徒的心，勸他們恆守所信的道，又說：“我們進入　神的國，必須經歷許多苦難。”

ccb.text: 坚固各地门徒的信心，鼓励他们要持守信仰，并且说：“我们在进入上帝国的道路上必经历许多苦难。”

csbs.text: 坚固门徒们的心，鼓励他们持守信仰，说：“我们进入神的国，必须经过很多患难。”
